footer.title: Dot Art Studio - Free Dot Art Generator

proMode.title: Pro Mode (AI Generation)
proMode.infoTitle: AI generates an image and automatically converts it to dot art
proMode.infoSub: Requests are limited for 5 minutes after generation.
proMode.gridLowResHint: Low-resolution models provide cleaner results for {size}x{size} grids
proMode.promptPlaceholder: e.g. a cute cat, a fire-breathing dragon
proMode.promptHint: Both Korean and English are supported (Korean is auto-translated)

customizer.ditherDescNone: Diffusion dithering is recommended for photo conversion
customizer.edgeBothDesc: Sobel edge-weighted sampling + sprite outline applied
customizer.edgeOnlyDesc: Preserves sharp boundaries with Sobel edge detection
customizer.outlineOnlyDesc: Adds dark outlines at color boundaries after conversion
customizer.edgeNoneDesc: Enable edge detection for sharper photo conversions

preview.emptyHint: Enter text and press the generate button

uploader.uploadHint: Drag or click to upload an image
uploader.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. (PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF)
uploader.fileReadError: An error occurred while reading the file.
uploader.imageLoadError: Unable to load image. Please try another file.
uploader.convertError: An error occurred during dot art conversion.

toast.photoConverted: Photo has been converted to dot art!
toast.aiGenerated: AI dot art has been generated!
toast.clipboardFail: Failed to copy to clipboard. Please check browser permissions.
toast.gifFail: Failed to generate GIF. Please try again.
